message:
refactor(indexer): introduce LexicalRebuildMessageBatch{,Chunk} type aliases for the lexical-rebuild fetch path

The lexical-rebuild fetch helpers passed around a
`HashMap<i64, Vec<crate::model::types::Message>>` and a
`Vec<(Vec<i64>, HashMap<i64, Vec<crate::model::types::Message>>)>`
in several places.  Both are mouthfuls and obscure the call sites'
actual intent ("messages grouped by conversation id" / "the same,
keyed by the chunk's conversation id list").

Two aliases land at the top of the module:

  type LexicalRebuildMessageBatch =
      HashMap<i64, Vec<crate::model::types::Message>>;

  type LexicalRebuildMessageBatchChunk =
      (Vec<i64>, LexicalRebuildMessageBatch);

The fetch helper return type and the intermediate `chunk_results`
binding both switch to the alias, eliminating the longest type
spellings from this file.  No behavioural change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
